first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's extensive full-stack experience, AI expertise, and DevOps skills as key strengths, while noting the lack of specific framework experience (Nest.js) and basic German as minor, manageable concerns. The minor variations in wording and the specific legacy technology mentioned as a concern (DLang vs. Kotlin/Java) are well within the range of normal run-to-run noise and are not linked to the change in university.
